chunks.text: Then order of n we got.

chunks.title: Classes of functions - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is linear.

chunks.text: Now same way, if you have the function f of n is equal to 2n plus 3, then it is order

chunks.title: Classes of functions - Abdul Bari

chunks.text: Even if you have f of n is equal to 500n plus 700, then also it is order of n.

chunks.text: See we are trying to say that the degree, these are all polynomials, the degree of a

chunks.title: Classes of functions - Abdul Bari

chunks.title: Classes of functions - Abdul Bari

chunks.title: Classes of functions - Abdul Bari

text: Now next, let us look at the types of time functions that we have got, the time complexities that we have obtained so far. We have got the time complexity as order of 1. So this we call it as constant. If the time complexity of any function, of any algorithm is 2, then it is constant. If it is 5, then also it is constant. If it is 5000, then also it is constant. So actually that does not mean the value, that is showing that the value is constant type. It is not dependent on size of the input. It is not order of n. n is the size of the input, so it is not dependent on n. Then the next one we got was log n. Log n, base 2, base 3, whatever the base of log may be, this is logarithmic. The time complexity is logarithmic. Then order of n we got. So this is linear. Now same way, if you have the function f of n is equal to 2n plus 3, then it is order of n. Even if you have f of n is equal to 500n plus 700, then also it is order of n. If you have f of n equal to n by 5000 plus 6, then also it is order of n. See we are trying to say that the degree, these are all polynomials, the degree of a polynomial is 1, that is n power 1. So we write n. We don't write the degree, we write the term itself. So it is order of n. Then for some algorithms we got the time complexity as n square. So this is quadratic. And for some algorithms we got it as n cube, matrix multiplication, cubic and this was matrix addition. Then for some algorithms we may get the time as 2 power n also. So this will be exponential. We haven't seen these type of algorithms but we may come across later on in coming videos. This is exponential. It may be 2 power n or it may be 3 power n or it may be n power n. It may be to the power of anything, so 2 power or 3 power or n power. So I call this as classes of functions or the types of time functions or also classes of functions or categories whatever you want, you can name this. So this is the different type of functions. So we have the class here, that is linear class or logarithmic class or quadratic class or cubic class. So we have the classes of linear.
